phq9.description: Loss of interest or pleasure in activities that were previously enjoyable.
phq9.completion_rule: Need at least one meaningful user statement describing reduced interest or enjoyment.
follow_up_examples: Have you noticed any changes in things you usually enjoy?
Do you still find pleasure in your hobbies or daily activities?
Have you lost interest in activities that were once enjoyable?

phq9.description: Feeling sad, hopeless, empty, or emotionally low.
phq9.completion_rule: Need at least one meaningful statement describing persistent low mood.
follow_up_examples: How have you been feeling emotionally lately?
Do you often feel sad or low?
Would you say your mood has changed recently?

phq9.description: Difficulty falling asleep, staying asleep, sleeping too much, or poor sleep quality.
phq9.completion_rule: Need at least one meaningful statement about sleep quality or duration.
follow_up_examples: How has your sleep been recently?
Are you sleeping more or less than usual?
Do you wake up feeling rested?

phq9.description: Feeling tired, fatigued, or lacking energy.
phq9.completion_rule: Need at least one meaningful statement about fatigue.
follow_up_examples: Have you been feeling more tired than usual?
How has your energy level been?
Do you find yourself exhausted even after resting?

phq9.description: Changes in appetite or eating habits.
phq9.completion_rule: Need at least one meaningful statement about appetite changes.
follow_up_examples: Have your eating habits changed recently?
Has your appetite increased or decreased?
Are you eating normally these days?

phq9.description: Feeling worthless, guilty, like a failure, or blaming oneself.
phq9.completion_rule: Need at least one meaningful statement indicating guilt or worthlessness.
follow_up_examples: How do you feel about yourself lately?
Do you ever blame yourself for things that happen?
Have you been feeling like a burden to others?

phq9.description: Difficulty concentrating, remembering things, or making decisions.
phq9.completion_rule: Need at least one meaningful statement describing concentration difficulties.
follow_up_examples: Have you been able to concentrate normally?
Do you find yourself forgetting things more often?
Has it become harder to stay focused?

phq9.description: Moving or speaking noticeably slower than usual, or feeling unusually restless.
phq9.completion_rule: Need at least one meaningful statement describing slowing down or restlessness.
follow_up_examples: Have you noticed yourself moving slower than usual?
Do you often feel restless or unable to sit still?
Have others commented that you've been unusually slow or restless?

phq9.description: Thoughts that life is not worth living, self-harm, or suicide.
phq9.completion_rule: Need direct evidence from the user's own words.
follow_up_examples: Sometimes when people feel overwhelmed they may feel life isn't worth living. Has that happened to you?
Have you had thoughts of hurting yourself?
Have you had thoughts that you'd be better off dead?

gad7.description: Feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge.
gad7.completion_rule: Need one meaningful statement describing nervousness.
follow_up_examples: How often have you been feeling anxious lately?
Do you often feel on edge?

gad7.description: Worrying too much about different things.
gad7.completion_rule: Need one meaningful statement describing excessive worry.
follow_up_examples: What kinds of things have you been worrying about?
Do you find it difficult to stop worrying?

gad7.completion_rule: Need one meaningful statement describing inability to control worry.
follow_up_examples: When you start worrying, can you usually stop?
Do your worries feel difficult to control?

gad7.completion_rule: Need one meaningful statement describing inability to relax.
follow_up_examples: Do you find it difficult to relax?
When you have free time, can you unwind easily?

gad7.description: Feeling so restless that it is hard to sit still.
gad7.completion_rule: Need one meaningful statement describing restlessness.
follow_up_examples: Do you often feel restless?
Is it difficult for you to sit still?

gad7.completion_rule: Need one meaningful statement describing irritability.
follow_up_examples: Have you been getting irritated more easily lately?
Do small things frustrate you more than before?

gad7.topic: Fear that something awful might happen
gad7.description: Persistent fear that something bad may happen.
gad7.completion_rule: Need one meaningful statement describing persistent fear.
follow_up_examples: Do you often feel that something bad might happen?
Do you find yourself expecting the worst?
